description_long: This is a modern, metallic airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a pointed nose, featuring the word 'NEO' emblazoned on its side. The aircraft has a mid-mounted, straight wing configuration with four visible turboprop engines, each equipped with multiple-blade propellers. The tail section is designed with a distinctive H-tail, consisting of twin vertical stabilizers connected by a horizontal stabilizer. The landing gear is not visible, suggesting it may be retractable. The cockpit is positioned at the very front of the fuselage, with a dark, enclosed canopy and several windows along the side for passengers.
description: A sleek, metallic airplane with mid-mounted straight wings, four turboprop engines, and a distinctive H-tail. The cockpit is forward and enclosed, with 'NEO' marked on the fuselage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, 'NEO' marking, and the H-tail configuration.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the straight wings, four turboprop engines, and twin vertical stabilizers.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the other side of the fuselage and tail.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view emphasizing the underwing engines, wing structure, and the H-tail from below.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, straight wings with moderate dihedral and prominent underwing engine nacelles; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Four underwing turboprop engines, each with multi-blade propellers.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers joined by a horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visible; likely retractable.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a dark canopy and multiple side windows.
